name: Liqun Commercial Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Liqun Commercial Group Co., Ltd. operates as a commercial retail chain company in China. It operates department stores, supermarkets, convenience stores, and electrical appliances stores. The company was formerly known as Qingdao Liqun Department Store Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Liqun Commercial Group Co., Ltd. in January 2018. Liqun Commercial Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Qingdao, China.
